name: sqlite3-doc
title: sqlite3-doc
description:
SQLite 3 documentation
SQLite is a C library that implements an SQL database engine.
Programs that link with the SQLite library can have SQL database
access without running a separate RDBMS process.
.
This package contains the documentation that is also available on
the SQLite homepage.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use sqlite3-doc because SQLite 3 documentation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use sqlite3-doc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair sqlite3-doc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `sqlite3-doc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
